steps.title: Connect claim and evidence
steps.content: The first sentence says Farrokh's installation felt both "familiar and distant." The second sentence explains why: the video screen made it resemble a movie theater, while the coal slag-encrusted room made it feel unfamiliar.

steps.title: Choose a confirming transition
steps.content: A suggests a time sequence, but no next event is introduced. B signals contrast, and D signals substitution; neither fits because the second sentence supports the first. The needed transition means "in fact" and introduces confirmation. The answer is C.
